red_flag_details: 3 J-code transfers on same date (2019-10-29) — potential coordinated restructuring or parking
parking_analyses.conclusion: Multiple same-date entity transfers detected. Requires manual review of entity relationships to determine if parking arrangement exists.

domain4_form144.note: No Form 144 notices provided. Form 144 electronic filing became mandatory April 13, 2023. For pre-2023 analysis periods, Form 144 data is limited to paper filings.

methodology.description: Systematic computational analysis of publicly available SEC EDGAR filings including Form 4 insider transaction reports, Form 144 notices of proposed sale, Schedule 13D/13G beneficial ownership reports, and 10-K/10-Q financial statements. Analysis applied economic benefit valuation using historical market prices, temporal clustering detection, violation deduplication, severity normalization across multiple analysis nodes, and beneficial ownership chain resolution. This analysis reveals non-obviou
data_sources: NKE historical closing prices (Yahoo Finance, split-adjusted)
tools_used: EDGAR Ownership XML Technical Specification v5.1

domain5_documentation.tier_separation_note: Tier 1 (TCR) contains only verified factual findings. Tier 2 (work product) contains scoring, bounty estimates, and strategic analysis — never submitted to SEC.

chart_specs.title: Figure 1: Insider Transaction Timeline by Economic Value
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Values computed from NKE closing prices.

chart_specs.title: Figure 2: Top Beneficiaries by Economic Value
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Stacked by: option spread | grant FMV | gift | transfer.

chart_specs.title: Figure 3: Filing Party Relationship Network
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Edge weights = shared transaction count.

chart_specs.title: Figure 4: Economic Benefit Distribution by Insider
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Area proportional to total economic benefit.

chart_specs.title: Figure 5: Transaction Cluster Analysis
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Clusters = 3+ transactions within 3 business days.

chart_specs.title: Figure 6: Estimated Penalty Exposure Breakdown
chart_specs.source_text: Source: Statutory penalty calculations. Civil + criminal + disgorgement + treble damages.
